hero.status: Based in Montreal · Available for new projects
hero.title: Frontend & Shopify developer with agency experience, building custom storefronts, integrations, and web experiences.
hero.subtitle: I use code and no-code tools to build fast Shopify sites, custom features, integrations, and lightweight web experiences like one-page Next.js builds.

about.block1:
I design and build fast, elegant web experiences built to perform.

My approach goes beyond code: it’s grounded in a deep understanding of user behavior, shaped by my studies in psychology in the United States. That dual expertise lets me build interfaces that aren’t just beautiful, but effective.
about.block2:
After moving to Montreal, I joined Field Office, where I worked on high-end marketing sites and demanding Shopify projects. I developed strong expertise in frontend development, performance, and turning complex designs into reliable, production-ready products.

Today, I collaborate with designers, agencies, and product teams to turn ideas into polished digital experiences.
about.block3:
Every project is held to the same standard: precision, code quality, and attention to every detail.

My goal is simple: build products that work flawlessly. Products that leave a mark.

design.title: Design Implementation
design.body: I turn Figma designs into fully working Shopify themes. Clean, responsive, and built to match the design properly without cutting corners.

features.title: Custom Features & Integrations
features.body: Custom Shopify features, apps, and integrations. If Shopify doesn’t do it out of the box, I build it so it works for your setup.

step1.label: You tell me what you need
step1.subLabel: No need for a perfect brief. Just explain what you’re trying to build or fix.

step2.label: I define the scope
step2.subLabel: I’ll come back with a clear plan, timeline, and cost so everything is straightforward.

step3.label: We build it
step3.subLabel: I develop, test, and refine until it’s solid and ready for production.

pricing.title: Simple, flexible pricing
pricing.body: I usually work on a monthly retainer so things stay predictable and flexible on both sides.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.title: Got a project in mind?
contact.body: Whether it’s a Shopify build, a custom web app, or something you’re not sure anyone can pull off — reach out. I’m always open to hearing what you’re working on.

resume.title: Shopify & Frontend Developer — Custom Storefronts, Apps & Integrations
resume.summary: Frontend & Shopify developer with 6+ years of experience building custom storefronts, backend integrations, and web experiences — from pixel-perfect Figma implementations to production backend services. A background in psychology informs a user-first approach to every interface. Now independent, collaborating with agencies, designers, and product teams.

bullets: Developed a daily database-to-Shopify sync app for Animo etc — automating bulk product creation and updates via webhooks, with custom inventory deduction logic overriding Shopify's default behavior

Built the full Atari Shopify storefront from Figma — MetaMask wallet sync for NFT purchases, Trevco integration to track fulfilled order status, and a custom fulfillment backend routing orders by shipping partner
Delivered pixel-perfect Liquid themes from Figma for clients including TOGETHXR, Jayson Home, and &OR Collective; ongoing retainer work including custom checkout app, cart and nav redesigns
Built cinematic scroll experiences with GSAP and Framer Motion; bilingual storefronts using next-intl; CMS integrations with Sanity, Contentful, and Prismic
Webflow builds including Groupe Copley, a bilingual EN/FR luxury real estate platform
Led Sanity v2 → v3 migration for Octasic (Next.js), a Montreal defense tech company building RF and wireless solutions for military and law enforcement
Supported students in building full-stack projects using Ruby on Rails, REST APIs, SQL, JavaScript, and Bootstrap
Provided hands-on guidance during project phases, helping career-changers debug, architect, and ship working applications
Full-stack development on enterprise web applications using C#, ASP.NET Core, Angular, and TypeScript
Collaborated with a team to plan, build, and maintain robust solutions; wrote extensible code and improved existing interfaces and performance

shopify.values: Theme dev, Liquid, Custom apps, Klaviyo, GTM

frontend.values: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Webflow

backend.values: Node.js, Supabase, REST APIs, Webhooks, C#, ASP.NET

tooling.values: Figma, Cloudinary, Vercel, Cursor, GitHub Copilot
